title: Sustained Energy
subtitle: Fueling through growing demands
description: As your body continues to support growth, you may notice occasional fatigue. Focusing on energy-dense, balanced, and slightly more frequent meals can help maintain your strength and overall well-being.
what_to_expect: Consistent appetite with slightly increased hunger
Higher need for sustained energy through meals
nutrition_focus: Eat balanced meals with healthy snacks if needed
Maintain consistent meal timing throughout the day
recommended_foods: Balanced meals like dal, roti, rice, sabzi, and salad
Fruits like banana, apple, orange, guava, and pomegranate
Vegetables including spinach, beetroot, carrots, beans, and broccoli
Protein and energy sources like milk, curd, paneer, lentils, nuts, eggs, or chicken (if preferred)
foods_to_limit: Skipping meals or long gaps between meals
hydration: Drink water regularly throughout the day
Include fluids like buttermilk, coconut water, or lemon water
reassurance: Balanced and timely meals can help you maintain steady energy and feel supported.

diabetes.personalized_description: Balanced and frequent meals help maintain stable energy and blood sugar levels.
nutrition_focus: Balance carbohydrates with protein and fiber
recommended_foods: Whole grains like oats and brown rice
Protein-rich foods like lentils, paneer, and nuts
diabetes.reassurance: Frequent and balanced meals support steady energy levels.

anemia.personalized_description: Consistent intake of iron-rich foods supports energy and helps manage fatigue.
nutrition_focus: Pair meals with vitamin C sources
foods_to_limit: Tea or coffee immediately after meals
anemia.reassurance: Regular nourishment supports improved energy over time.

hypertension.personalized_description: Balanced meals with controlled salt intake support stable blood pressure.
nutrition_focus: Keep meals balanced and moderate in salt
hypertension.reassurance: Consistent meals support a calm and balanced routine.

thyroid.personalized_description: A balanced and steady diet supports overall metabolic stability.
thyroid.reassurance: Balanced nutrition supports your body's natural rhythm.

multi_condition_blend.combined_message: When managing multiple conditions, focusing on balanced, frequent, and energy-rich meals helps maintain strength and stability.
multi_condition_blend.reassurance: Steady nourishment supports your energy and overall well-being.
